zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Domville於大約1239年出生在英國爾奧可頓時，他的父親Matthew de Domville26歲，母親Agnes Wettenhall23歲。他於大約1266年與Margaret de Venables在英國英格蘭爾金德頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1289年在英國爾享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Domville于大约1239年出生在英国爾奧可頓时，他的父亲Matthew de Domville26岁，母亲Agnes Wettenhall23岁。他于大约1266年与Margaret de Venables在英国英格兰爾金德頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1289年在英国爾享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Domville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dumville
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Donville (Calvados).  See also  Dumbell  .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Domville was born about 1239, in Oxton, Cheshire, England, his father, Matthew de Domville, was 26 and his mother, Agnes Wettenhall, was 23. He married Margaret de Venables about 1266, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1289, in Cheshire, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Domville est né environ 1239, à Oxton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Matthew de Domville, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes Wettenhall, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Venables environ 1266, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1289, à Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Domville um 1239 in Oxton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Matthew de Domville 26 und seine Mutter Agnes Wettenhall 23. Er hat um 1266 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret de Venables geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1289 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Domville è nato il circa 1239 nel Oxton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Matthew de Domville, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Wettenhall, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Venables circa 1266, nel Kinderton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1289, nel Cheshire, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Domvilleが約1239年にイギリスチェシュアイアオクストンで生まれた時，父Matthew de Domvilleは26歳，母Agnes Wettenhallは23歳であった。約1266年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンでMargaret de Venablesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1289年にイギリスチェシュアイアで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Domville(이)가 대략 1239년 영국 체실르 스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Matthew de Domville(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Wettenhall(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1266년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴에서 Margaret de Venables(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1289년 영국 체실르에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Domville nasceu aproximadamente 1239, em Oxton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Matthew de Domville, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Wettenhall, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Venables aproximadamente 1266, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1289, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Domville родился около 1239 г. в местности окстон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Matthew de Domville было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Wettenhall, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Venables около 1266 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1289 г. в местности чешир, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Domville nació aproximadamente 1239, en Oxton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Matthew de Domville, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnes Wettenhall, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Margaret de Venables aproximadamente 1266, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1289, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
